name: part_008
file: tmp_【 3D LIVE 】ゲストもたくさん❕重大告知アリ❕みんなで楽しも🍙💜💜【 #猫又おかゆ生誕祭2026 】 [rYpbqdD1oiQ]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_008.webm

scenes.description: Performance of the song "Akuma no Odorikata".
MC section after the song where Nekomata Okayu talks about her performance and introduces the upcoming announcement.

subtitles.original:
悪魔の踊り方
作詞・作曲：キタニタツヤ
subtitles.english:
Akuma no Odorikata
Lyrics & Composition: Tatsuya Kitani

subtitles.original: 感情なんてもんはどうしても無駄だって悪魔は言った
subtitles.english: The devil said that emotions are useless no matter what.

subtitles.original: 何もかも捨てちまえよ
subtitles.english: Throw everything away.

subtitles.original: 嗚呼　一杯の喜怒哀楽さえも
subtitles.english: Ah, even a mouthful of joy, anger, grief, and pleasure.

subtitles.original: どうしようもない事実　ヒトは終焉から逃れられない
subtitles.english: An unavoidable fact: humans cannot escape the end.

subtitles.original: 何も抗えない欲望に従え
subtitles.english: Submit to the desires you cannot resist.

subtitles.original: 思考を休めるな脳味噌を回せ
subtitles.english: Don't let your thoughts rest, keep your brain spinning.

subtitles.original: 「誰もお前のことなど見ちゃいないさ」
subtitles.english: "Nobody is looking at you anyway."

subtitles.original: おかしくなってしまうことをどうして恥じる？
subtitles.english: Why be ashamed of going crazy?

subtitles.original: お前らに完璧で間違った
subtitles.english: Because I'll teach you the perfect and

subtitles.original: 踊り方を教えてやるから
subtitles.english: wrong way to dance.

subtitles.original: いっせーので捨てちまえ
subtitles.english: On the count of three, throw it away,

subtitles.original: そんな命ならば
subtitles.english: if that's all your life is worth.

subtitles.original: 何十何百何千何万回
subtitles.english: Learn it tens, hundreds, thousands,

subtitles.original: 学習しなさいな
subtitles.english: tens of thousands of times.

subtitles.original: どうしたってさ　空っぽの骸骨だろ
subtitles.english: No matter what, you're an empty skeleton, aren't you?

subtitles.original: わかっているのかい
subtitles.english: Do you understand?

subtitles.original: 感情なんていつ何時でも邪魔だって悪魔は言った
subtitles.english: The devil said that emotions are a nuisance at any time.

subtitles.original: 反論の余地などない
subtitles.english: There is no room for argument.

subtitles.original: 嗚呼　人生に意味を与えておくれ
subtitles.english: Ah, please give meaning to my life.

subtitles.original: 420でさえも救えない
subtitles.english: I learned there's an end that

subtitles.original: 終焉があると知った
subtitles.english: even 420 cannot save.

subtitles.original: 誰も疑わない神様を疑え
subtitles.english: Doubt the god that nobody doubts.

subtitles.original: 思考を休めるな脳味噌を回せ
subtitles.english: Don't let your thoughts rest, keep your brain spinning.

subtitles.original: 「誰もお前のことなど見ちゃいないさ」
subtitles.english: "Nobody is looking at you anyway."

subtitles.original: 躊躇っている
subtitles.english: Know the futility of

subtitles.original: 数秒の無益さを知れ
subtitles.english: those few seconds of hesitation.

subtitles.original: お前らに完璧で間違った
subtitles.english: Because I'll teach you the perfect and

subtitles.original: 踊り方を教えてやるから
subtitles.english: wrong way to dance.

subtitles.original: いっせーので捨てちまえ
subtitles.english: On the count of three, throw it away,

subtitles.original: そんな命ならば
subtitles.english: if that's all your life is worth.

subtitles.original: 何十何百何千何万回
subtitles.english: Learn it tens, hundreds, thousands,

subtitles.original: 学習しなさいな
subtitles.english: tens of thousands of times.

subtitles.original: どうしたってさ　頭ン中空っぽなことわかっていないようだな
subtitles.english: No matter what, it seems you don't realize your head is empty.

subtitles.original: 承認欲にレイプされ
subtitles.english: A woman raped by the desire for approval,

subtitles.original: 死んだ花をぶら下げている女
subtitles.english: hanging dead flowers.

subtitles.original: 何かを愛することすらままならないまま
subtitles.english: Unable to even love something,

subtitles.original: 餌を待つだけ
subtitles.english: just waiting for bait.

subtitles.original: 踊り方を知らない
subtitles.english: To those who don't know how to dance

subtitles.original: 芸術の価値などわからない奴らに
subtitles.english: and don't understand the value of art...

subtitles.original: 堕落していれば何も見えないまま
subtitles.english: While falling into corruption, you see nothing.

subtitles.original: 真善美に背いた
subtitles.english: Because I'll teach you a way to dance

subtitles.original: 踊り方を教えてやるから
subtitles.english: that defies truth, goodness, and beauty.

subtitles.original: いっせーので狂っちまえ
subtitles.english: On the count of three, go mad

subtitles.original: 惨めな姿で
subtitles.english: in your miserable state.

subtitles.original: 何十何百何千何万
subtitles.english: Among tens, hundreds, thousands,

subtitles.original: 何億人の中でさ
subtitles.english: tens of thousands, hundreds of millions.

subtitles.original: そうして埋もれていったっていいと
subtitles.english: How can you say it's fine

subtitles.original: どうして言えるのだろう
subtitles.english: to be buried like that?

subtitles.original: ねえ、世界が煩っている狂信は
subtitles.english: Hey, the fanaticism the world is suffering from...

subtitles.original: 健常者でさえ目が眩むような
subtitles.english: Is emitting a light that would

subtitles.original: 光を放っている
subtitles.english: dazzle even a healthy person.

subtitles.original: 今夜、悪魔がお前らに乞うぜ
subtitles.english: Tonight, the devil makes a plea to you.

subtitles.original: 神とやらに惑わされるなよ
subtitles.english: Don't be deceived by this thing called god.

subtitles.original: はーい！「悪魔の踊り方」、歌わせていただきましたー！
subtitles.english: Hi! I just sang "Akuma no Odorikata"!

subtitles.original: いやー、「悪魔の踊り方」ってさ、
subtitles.english: Man, "Akuma no Odorikata"

subtitles.original: すごいかっこいい曲じゃない？
subtitles.english: is such a cool song, isn't it?

subtitles.original: ああいう、かっこいい歌歌うと、
subtitles.english: When I sing cool songs like that,

subtitles.original: なんか、ちゃんと様になっているのかなーって、
subtitles.english: I wonder if I'm pulling it off properly...

subtitles.original: なんか、心細い気持ちに実はなってるんだよね。
subtitles.english: I actually start to feel a bit insecure.

subtitles.original: ちゃんと、かっこよく歌えてたかな？僕。
subtitles.english: Did I manage to sing it coolly?

subtitles.original: はい！ということでね、なんかもー、
subtitles.english: Alright! And so, everything up to this point

subtitles.original: ここまで、もうあっという間だったよね。
subtitles.english: has gone by in a flash, hasn't it?

subtitles.original: もうこんな時間経ってるんだーっていう感じでございますが、
subtitles.english: It feels like "wow, has it been this long already?" but...

subtitles.original: なんとですね！ここから告知タイムとさせていただきたいと思いまーす！
subtitles.english: Guess what! From here, I'd like to move on to the announcement segment!
